title: Custom Activities in Mobile App
excerpt: It appears that you can not view or select custom activities on the mobile app. What’s available on the desktop version should be available on the app. This is a key reason we use the mobile app and picked Monday.com.

posts.author: Jasondixon (Jason Dixon)
posts.cookedHtml: It appears that you can not view or select custom activities on the mobile app. What’s available on the desktop version should be available on the app. This is a key reason we use the mobile app and picked Monday.com.
